bio: Full Stack Developer working with MERN stack and Django, focused on building scalable and user-friendly web applications through hands-on project development.
summary: I’m Pawan — a Full Stack Developer currently working on building web applications using the MERN stack and Django. I handle both frontend and backend, including UI development, APIs, and data management.

Right now, I’m actively building projects to strengthen my practical skills. I have been working on full-stack applications and also exploring Django while developing real use-case projects like an admission consultancy portal.

While building these projects, I also use modern AI tools to improve productivity, understand concepts faster, and implement features more efficiently, while ensuring I understand the logic behind what I build.
Currently, I’m focused on improving my development skills, writing cleaner code, and preparing myself to contribute effectively in a professional development environment.
